hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I{} npx prettier --write '{}' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.json) python3 -m json.tool "{}" > /dev/null && echo "JSON valid: {}" ;; *.yml|*.yaml) python3 -c "import yaml,sys; yaml.safe_load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "{}" && echo "YAML valid: {}" ;; esac'
